attributes.action: Make it law that in Parliamentary PM questions, they are answered!!
attributes.additional_details: Please stop the kindergarten behaviour in parliament, our once great country needs leaders and not children’s question time!
attributes.background: The British people are fed up with the behaviour of MP’s especially this Prime Minister when asked a question they will not answer! Instead throw abuse at anyone else to avoid the question. The speaker is also implicit in allowing this! Why are we employing him! There is no order in the house!

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Introduce standards for answers to PMQs to be enforced by the Speaker
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762566
